prompt: Are the docs up to date? Audit and sync.
expected: Auto-detect existing docs, cross-reference git history for drift, propose patches for added/removed features, get approval, apply

prompt: Should I have a DEPLOY doc?
expected: Stack-aware decision: detect deploy complexity, propose DEPLOY.md only if non-trivial (Docker/k8s/multi-stage), skip if trivial
Enforce GitHub-style README layout (title, quick start, links to sub-docs), reflect current project state, ask before writing
